text:
Konattsu (コナッツ, Konattsu) Jump Ryu! Vol. 21 - Togashi's notes is a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Tubeppa. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Konattsu stays stationed by his employer Prince Tubeppa, as she works on her laptop.
